description_long: This object is a metallic machine gun with a long, cylindrical barrel and a prominent bipod for stabilization. The gun features a straight, angular receiver and a simple, solid stock at the rear, with no visible ergonomic padding. The ammunition feed appears to be belt-fed, with the feed tray and ejection port clearly visible on the side. The surface of the gun is a matte metallic gray, contrasting with the dark, rough platform it rests on. The iron sights are basic, with a fixed front post and a simple rear notch, providing straightforward aiming capability.
description: A metallic machine gun with a long barrel, bipod, and simple iron sights, resting on a dark, rough platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel, bipod, and the gun's overall length, with the stock and receiver visible in the background.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the bipod, receiver, and the belt-fed ammunition system, with the stock and ejection port visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view showing the full length of the gun, the bipod placement, and the overall layout of the receiver and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the receiver, with the barrel and bipod less visible.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with cooling holes
attribute_stock_design: solid metal stock with straight, angular profile
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: fixed rear notch with fixed front post
